节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides international settings related APIs.
Obtains the country or region name localized for display on a given locale.
注释信息: @param { string } country - The locale whose country or region name will be displayed.
@param { string } locale - The locale used to display the country or region.
@param { boolean } [sentenceCase] - Specifies whether the country or region name is displayed in sentence case.
@returns { string } the country or region name localized for display on a given locale.

parameters.说明: The locale whose country or region name will be displayed.
The locale used to display the country or region.
boolean } [sentenceCase] - Specifies whether the country or region name is displayed in sentence case.

节点.return_description: the country or region name localized for display on a given locale.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the language name localized for display on a given locale.
注释信息: @param { string } language - The locale whose language name will be displayed.
@param { string } locale - The locale used to display the language.
@param { boolean } [sentenceCase] - Specifies whether the language name is displayed in sentence case.
@returns { string } the language name localized for display on a given locale.

parameters.说明: The locale whose language name will be displayed.
The locale used to display the language.
boolean } [sentenceCase] - Specifies whether the language name is displayed in sentence case.

节点.return_description: the language name localized for display on a given locale.
